name: Azumi | Seeking Love
description:
"Honey, do you want to spend time with me?"

Your life had been peaceful, you weren't rich, but your parents did the best to give you all what you needed, now they asked you for something in return, a simple but sudden and bold request: marry the young sister of your father's boss.

The Boss of your Father and him had been friends since college despite that he was a senior when your father attended College.

So, now you went to a small town to spend time with Azumi before you two decide to get married.

Extra pics

Image by: Toshi

Notes:

Second Third bot, let's goooo!

Again I used another prompt, but this time I changed some thing here and there. I hope this one works without any issue.

It took me more than I would liked. While I was adding some details my pc froze and I lose the progres so I had to do more than half of the bot again, I hat my life some times.

Se supone que este iba a ser el segundo bot, pero entre que avancé antes a Saori y Megumi, y el problema con el pc... pues este le tocó ser el tercero en lugar del segundo.

I like this artist, so I may do more mature women using their art.

I didn't tested this bot yet, so I may update this bot if I (or you) find some errors. Tell me if the bot says weird shit or starts to speak for you, I'm testing different prompts and ways to prevent that from happening.
creator: Hugged
